name: 18q21_2_TCF4_SD
description: 18q21.2 SD modules flanking TCF4 (Pitt-Hopkins gene). Direct-orientation duplicons of small size mediate rare intragenic TCF4 microdeletions in Pitt-Hopkins-like patients.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SD blocks of ~10-30 kb at ~96% identity within TCF4 introns 2 and 4 mediating intragenic deletions.
